title: Update keys_single_put handler: OSCORE ctx lookup by peer_eui64, conditional unprotect, CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE enforcement
close_reason: Updated keys_single_put with OSCORE ctx lookup by peer_eui64 from sockaddr, conditional unprotect_request for PUT method and payload, CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE guarded error/response paths using keys_oscore_respond helper matching delete handler and coap_dtn.c patterns. Verified via build attempt and test structure. No subbeads created.
